_comment: Per-machine tunables for the orchestrator. Adjust based on actual resource consumption.
claudeAllowedTools: Bash(git *) Bash(gh *) Bash(pnpm *) Bash(npx *) Edit Write Read Glob Grep Agent WebFetch WebSearch
claudeDisallowedTools: Bash(rm *) Bash(sudo *) Bash(curl *) Bash(wget *) Bash(npm install -g *)
_unsafeAutoApprove_comment: Set to true ONLY if you accept the risk of workers running without permission prompts. Required for fully unattended overnight runs. Read CLAUDE.md ルール5 before enabling.
